name: cut
description: Cut plane for clipping ball visualization. Shows only material on one side of a plane.
notes: Cut plane syntax via command is unreliable — inline parameters (origin, normal) may cause 'Unused extra parameter' errors.
Recommended approach: configure cut planes interactively in PFC GUI, then export with 'plot export datafile filename "<path>"' to capture the working syntax.
The datafile output will contain the exact cut parameters that can be reused.

datafile_reference.description: Example cut section from a datafile export
